category_title: Students with cerebral palsy and hearing impairment focused on communication goals
scenario_title: Developing creative ideas using digital mind maps
minimal_context: Jason is using a Google Drive mind map during a Liberal Studies lesson to work out the definition of emotion.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please open the Google Drive mind map and work out what the definition of emotion is today.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I am not sure how to start. I will just wait a minute.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you should add?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I am looking at what the others are doing on the drive.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying to come up with a new idea.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I see Ben put 'HAPPY' first. I will just develop his idea into 'HAPPY in a WORKING PLACE'.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please open the Google Drive mind map and work out what the definition of emotion is today.

STUDENT: I am not sure how to start. I will just wait a minute.

TUTOR: What do you think you should add?

STUDENT: I am looking at what the others are doing on the drive.

TUTOR: Keep trying to come up with a new idea.

STUDENT: I see Ben put 'HAPPY' first. I will just develop his idea into 'HAPPY in a WORKING PLACE'.

task.content: Make a mind map to work out what is the definition of emotion today
task.learning_goal: Develop creative ideas when introduced to a new topic

context.social_setting: Working independently but with visibility of peers' work

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When introduced to a new topic and asked to develop creative ideas
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Relies on a peer putting an idea first, then develops their idea (e.g., Ben put 'HAPPY' first, then Jason developed his idea into 'HAPPY in a WORKING PLACE')
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Motivation of students’ self-regulated learning remains at a very low level in the initial phase

behavior_patterns.condition: When setting a goal in their learning
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Sets an initial goal that may not be enough, requiring the teacher to ask the student to think of one more thing to improve
